# Vendor Research Docs

This folder keeps local research outputs for `vendor/*` reference repositories.

## Reports

- [2026-04-02 Vendor Evolution Summary](./2026-04-02-vendor-evolution-summary.md)
- [2026-04-02 Vendor Evolution Raw Report](./2026-04-02-vendor-evolution-raw.md)
- [2026-03-26 Vendor Evolution Summary](./2026-03-26-vendor-evolution-summary.md)
- [2026-03-26 Vendor Evolution Raw Report](./2026-03-26-vendor-evolution-raw.md)

## Conventions

- `*-raw.md`: generated from submodule commit ranges and changed files
- `*-summary.md`: human summary focused on skill surface changes and workflow evolution
- Keep reports scoped to one refresh cycle so cross-vendor trends stay comparable
